about_title: We Build Digital Solutions That Scale
about_intro: At AG CodeDev, we’re a team of developers, strategists, and automation specialists focused on turning complex business challenges into clean, high-performing digital products. No fluff. No broken promises. Just measurable results.
val1_desc: We ship exactly what we scope. Every line of code is documented, tested, and built for production from day one.
val2_desc: Clear timelines, fixed pricing, and weekly progress updates. You’re never left guessing about your project’s status.
val3_desc: We don’t apply quick patches. We engineer scalable, secure systems designed to grow with your business.
about_cta_text: Ready to turn your vision into a scalable, high-converting reality?
phc_lead: Keep Your WordPress Site Healthy: Identify and Manage Outdated Plugins Effortlessly.
phc_problem_1_desc: Plugins not updated for 6+ months may contain unpatched vulnerabilities. WordPress won't warn you if no update exists.
phc_problem_2_desc: Unmaintained code can conflict with newer WordPress versions, causing errors, slowdowns, or broken features.
phc_solution_desc: Plugin Health Check automatically monitors your plugins, alerts you to stale ones, and helps you act before issues arise.
feat1_desc: Identifies plugins not updated for a configurable period (default: 6 months), comparing against WordPress.org repository.
feat2_desc: Prominent dashboard alerts show which plugins are outdated, their last release date, and days since last update.
feat3_desc: Configurable email summaries (daily/weekly/monthly) sent to administrators—stay informed without logging in.
feat4_desc: Adjust stale threshold, exclude specific plugins, and optionally enable auto-deactivation after warning period.
feat5_desc: Uses caching to minimize external API calls—zero impact on your site's speed or server load.
feat6_desc: Built with WordPress coding standards, security best practices, and no unnecessary bloat.
step1_desc: Upload the plugin via WordPress admin or install from ZIP. Takes <60 seconds.
step2_desc: Set your stale threshold, email preferences, and exclusion list in 2 minutes.
step3_desc: Receive alerts when plugins go stale. Act before vulnerabilities or conflicts arise.
faq1_q: Does this plugin replace the built-in WordPress update checker?
faq1_a: No, it complements it. WordPress shows updates when they are available. Plugin Health Check identifies plugins that might not have had updates released recently, potentially indicating they are unmaintained or abandoned.
faq2_q: How often does the plugin check for stale plugins?
faq2_a: It performs a check periodically using WordPress cron jobs (typically once daily). Administrators can also trigger a manual check from the settings page.
faq3_q: Can I ignore specific plugins from the checks?
faq3_a: Yes, the settings page includes an option to select and exclude specific plugins from the health check scan.
faq4_q: Is the automatic deactivation feature safe?
faq4_a: The automatic deactivation is optional and highly configurable. It's designed as a safety net after a significant grace period. It's recommended to review the list of stale plugins manually before relying on automatic deactivation, especially on critical sites.
faq5_q: Does this plugin send data to external servers?
faq5_a: No, it only fetches public information from the official WordPress.org API to compare plugin versions. No sensitive site data is transmitted. Email notifications are sent from your own server if enabled.
phc_final_cta_title: Ready to Secure Your WordPress Site?
phc_final_cta_desc: Join hundreds of administrators who proactively manage plugin health. Get instant access, lifetime updates, and 30-day money-back guarantee.
fpdf_lead: Create professional PDF invoices, quotes, and receipts directly within your WordPress dashboard, intuitively.
fpdf_problem_1_desc: Switching between Word, Excel, or external accounting tools breaks your workflow. Errors pile up, branding gets inconsistent.
fpdf_problem_2_title: Cloud tools cost monthly & risk data
fpdf_problem_2_desc: Subscriptions add up. External servers mean your client data leaves your control. GDPR compliance becomes complex.
fpdf_solution_desc: FatturaPDF WP gives you a WYSIWYG editor, pre-filled templates, and instant PDF generation. Keep data on your server, pay once, brand everything perfectly.
fpdf_feat1_desc: Edit content directly in the visual editor. See exactly how the final PDF will look before exporting.
fpdf_feat2_desc: Save VAT, address, and company info once. Auto-injected into every new invoice or quote.
fpdf_feat3_desc: Switch between professional color themes and upload your logo via WordPress media library.
fpdf_feat4_desc: Layout designed for Italian tax standards (VAT, P.IVA, breakdown fields). Ready for EU freelancers & agencies.
fpdf_feat5_desc: All data stays on your server. One payment. Zero hidden fees. Full GDPR control.
fpdf_feat6_desc: Generate, preview, and download high-quality PDFs in seconds. No external processing delays.
fpdf_step1_desc: Upload via WP admin. Enter company details & pick a theme. Takes <2 minutes.
fpdf_step2_desc: Use the WYSIWYG panel to adjust items, taxes, discounts, and client info in real-time.
fpdf_step3_desc: Download the polished PDF instantly. Attach to emails or print directly from WordPress.
fpdf_faq1_q: Does this work with any WordPress theme?
fpdf_faq1_a: Yes. The plugin runs entirely in the WordPress admin dashboard and uses native WP APIs. Theme conflicts are extremely rare.
fpdf_faq2_q: Can I generate Italian Electronic Invoices (Fattura Elettronica SDI)?
fpdf_faq2_a: No. This plugin generates professional PDF documents (invoices, quotes, receipts). It is NOT compliant with the Italian SDI electronic invoicing system required by law. Use dedicated accounting software for SDI compliance.
fpdf_faq3_q: How do I upload my company logo?
fpdf_faq3_a: Use the "Upload Logo" button inside the invoice creation panel. It integrates with WordPress's native media library for secure, optimized handling.
fpdf_faq4_a: Yes. For installation, setup, or usage questions, contact me via the support form. I respond within 24h with actionable guidance.
fpdf_faq5_q: Is this suitable for non-Italian users?
fpdf_faq5_a: Absolutely. While optimized for Italian tax formats, the core features (WYSIWYG editor, PDF generation, themes, logo upload) are universal. You can manually adapt default text fields to match your country's requirements.
fpdf_final_cta_title: Stop Juggling Multiple Tools. Invoice Like a Pro.
fpdf_final_cta_desc: Get instant access to a clean, fast, and fully local PDF generator. One payment. Lifetime updates. 30-day refund guarantee.
wfec-hero-title:
Stop Manually Tracking WooCommerce Orders.
Sync, Notify & Log in Seconds.
wfec-hero-sub: Pre-built n8n automation that routes every new order to Google Sheets or Airtable, alerts you via Slack or Telegram, and handles errors automatically. Zero code. Setup in <10 minutes.
wfec-prob-1-desc: Exporting CSVs, updating spreadsheets, and checking emails fragments your workflow and kills productivity.
wfec-prob-2-desc: Without real-time alerts, delayed fulfillment leads to bad reviews, refund requests, and abandoned carts.
wfec-sol-desc: WooCommerce fires a webhook → n8n normalizes data → saves to Sheets/Airtable → notifies your team → logs errors. You close deals, not spreadsheets.
wfec-inc-1-desc: Tested, optimized, and error-handled. Includes routing for Sheets/Airtable, Slack/Telegram notifications, and webhook response logic.
wfec-inc-2-desc: Step-by-step setup for Slack, Google, Airtable & Telegram. Available in 🇮🇹 IT, 🇬🇧 EN, 🇩🇪 DE. Zero guesswork.
wfec-inc-3-desc: Exact payload format, endpoint setup, secret validation, and testing instructions. Works with WC 7.x+.
wfec-inc-4-desc: Use for personal projects, clients, or agencies. One payment. Receive future improvements at no extra cost.
wfec-excluded-note: Not included: n8n hosting, WooCommerce store, third-party API keys (Slack/Google/Airtable/Telegram), or custom development.
wfec-step-1-desc: Open n8n → Click "Import from File" → Upload the .json. The canvas loads instantly.
wfec-step-2-desc: Follow the multilingual guide to add Slack, Sheets/Airtable, and Telegram credentials.
wfec-step-3-desc: Copy the n8n webhook URL → Paste into WooCommerce Settings → Advanced → Webhooks. Activate and test with a dummy order.
wfec-price-note: No subscriptions. No usage limits. Own the workflow forever.
wfec-price-feat-1: ✓ Complete n8n workflow (.json) with error handling
wfec-price-sec: 🔒 Secure checkout via Payhip • Instant digital delivery • VAT handled automatically
wfec-faq-1-q: Do I need to know how to code or use JavaScript?
wfec-faq-1-a: No. The workflow is fully visual. The guide walks you through connecting credentials and setting environment variables using n8n's UI. If you can copy-paste and click "Save", you're set.
wfec-faq-2-q: Does it work with n8n cloud (free tier) or self-hosted?
wfec-faq-2-a: Both. The workflow uses standard nodes included in n8n free cloud and self-hosted versions. No premium or external services required beyond your chosen inventory/notification apps.
wfec-faq-3-q: Can I choose between Google Sheets and Airtable? Or Slack vs Telegram?
wfec-faq-3-a: Yes. The workflow includes routing switches. Set `DESTINATION_INVENTORY=google_sheets` or `airtable`, and `NOTIFICATION_TYPE=slack` or `telegram` in n8n Variables. Only the selected path runs.
wfec-faq-4-a: Tested and optimized for WooCommerce 7.x and 8.x+. The webhook payload is normalized to handle minor version differences. Works with any standard WC install.
wfec-faq-5-q: What if something breaks or I can't set it up?
wfec-faq-5-a: You get 14 days to test. If the workflow fails to run as documented, or setup support doesn't resolve your issue, email us for a full refund. No hassle, no questions.
wfec-final-title: Stop Chasing Orders. Let the System Do It.
wfec-final-desc: Import once. Configure in 10 minutes. Save hours every week. Instant download. 14-day guarantee.
wfec_desc: Stop manually tracking orders. Auto-sync to Sheets/Airtable, notify via Slack/Telegram, and handle errors automatically. Zero code. Setup in <10 min.
privacy-controller-desc: AG CodeDev is operated by AGCodeDev, a freelance developer based in Rome, Italy. For privacy inquiries, contact: .
privacy-data-1: Contact forms: Name, email, message content (via Formspree).
privacy-data-2: Purchases: Transaction data handled by Payhip (we receive only order confirmation, not full payment details).
privacy-data-3: Technical data: IP address, browser type, pages visited (via server logs; no tracking cookies by default).
privacy-purpose-1: To respond to your inquiries and provide support.
privacy-purpose-2: To deliver digital products and license keys after purchase.
privacy-purpose-3: To comply with legal obligations (e.g., tax records for receipts).
privacy-legal-desc: We process your data based on: (a) your consent (contact forms), (b) contract performance (product delivery), (c) legal obligations (fiscal records), or (d) legitimate interest (security, improvements).
privacy-sharing-1: Payhip: Processes payments. Data may be transferred outside the EU under Standard Contractual Clauses.
privacy-sharing-2: Formspree: Handles contact form submissions. Servers located in the EU/US with GDPR-compliant safeguards.
privacy-sharing-3: GitHub Pages: Hosts this website. May process basic access logs.
privacy-sharing-note: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data.
privacy-retention-1: Contact form data: Deleted after resolution + 12 months (fiscal retention).
privacy-retention-2: Purchase records: Retained for 10 years per Italian tax law.
privacy-retention-3: Server logs: Automatically deleted after 30 days.
privacy-rights-desc: You have the right to: access, rectify, erase, restrict, port, or object to processing of your data. To exercise these rights, contact . You may also lodge a complaint with the Italian Data Protection Authority (garanteprivacy.it).
privacy-cookies-desc: This site uses only essential cookies for functionality (e.g., language preference). No tracking or advertising cookies are used by default. You can disable cookies via browser settings.
privacy-changes-desc: We may update this policy. The "Last updated" date will reflect changes. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance.
privacy-contact-desc:
For privacy questions:
AG CodeDev — Rome, Italy
terms-acceptance-desc: By accessing or purchasing from AG CodeDev, you agree to these Terms. If you disagree, do not use our services.
terms-products-1: License grant: Upon payment, you receive a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the digital product (plugin, workflow, guide) for personal or commercial projects.
terms-products-2: Restrictions: You may not resell, redistribute, or sublicense the product as a standalone item. You may use it in client projects.
terms-products-3: Updates: Future updates are provided at the creator's discretion. No guaranteed update schedule.
terms-products-4: Ownership: All intellectual property remains with AG CodeDev. You own the output generated using the product.
terms-custom-1: Scope: Work is defined in a written agreement or project brief. Changes require mutual approval.
terms-custom-2: Payment: 50% upfront, 50% on delivery (unless otherwise agreed). Invoices issued as "ricevuta" per Italian freelance regulations.
terms-custom-3: Delivery: Timelines are estimates. Delays due to client feedback or scope changes extend deadlines.
terms-custom-4: Revisions: Includes 2 rounds of revisions. Additional revisions billed at €50/hour.
terms-payment-1: Payments processed via Payhip (PCI-DSS compliant). We do not store card details.
terms-payment-2: Prices are in EUR. VAT may apply per EU regulations. Italian customers: receipts issued under "regime forfettario" (VAT-exempt).
terms-payment-3: No refunds for digital products after download, except as required by EU consumer law (14-day withdrawal right for unused digital content).
terms-refund-1: Digital products: 14-day refund if the product is defective or doesn't work as documented. Contact within 14 days of purchase with proof of issue.
terms-refund-2: Custom services: Refunds considered case-by-case before work begins. After work starts, refunds prorated for unfinished work.
terms-refund-3: To request a refund: with order ID and reason.
terms-liability-desc: AG CodeDev provides services "as is". We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages (e.g., lost profits, data loss). Maximum liability is limited to the amount paid for the specific product/service. You are responsible for testing products in a staging environment before production use.
terms-ip-desc: All content, code, designs, and documentation on this site are owned by AG CodeDev and protected by copyright. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited. Third-party libraries (e.g., n8n, WordPress) remain under their original licenses.
terms-termination-desc: We may suspend or terminate access if you violate these Terms. Upon termination, licenses to digital products remain valid for already-downloaded items, but future updates may cease.
terms-governing-desc: These Terms are governed by Italian law. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Rome, Italy, unless mandatory consumer protection laws apply.
terms-contact-desc:
For questions about these Terms:
